bug_locations.reason: is_scalar_field only checks field.type_ against BaseModel and misses Union fields whose sub_fields are BaseModel types, so Union[BaseModel, BaseModel] is misclassified as a scalar query parameter instead of a body parameter. This matches the OpenAPI traceback where the union body field is processed as an operation parameter and the POST requests fail validation.

get_param_field relies on is_scalar_field to convert non-scalar parameters without explicit schema into Body parameters. Because Union[BaseModel, BaseModel] is treated as scalar, this body conversion is skipped and the bad Query schema propagates into OpenAPI generation and request parsing.
